However, it is possible to develop a virus that can disable or bypass anti-virus software, making it more difficult for the system to defend against other types of threats. Identify vulnerabilities in antivirus software: Researchers and developers working on antivirus software may sometimes introduce bugs or vulnerabilities in their code due to human error, lack of testing, or other reasons.
